original_abstract: International Higher Education (IHE) publishes insightful, informed, and high-quality commentary and analysis on trends and issues of importance to higher education systems, institutions, and stakeholders around the world.
humanized_abstract: International Higher Education (IHE) publishes thoughtful, timely, and scholarly analysis of topics of concern and interest to higher education systems, institutions, and communities internationally.

document.output: International Higher Education (IHE) publishes thoughtful, timely, and scholarly analysis of topics of concern and interest to higher education systems, institutions, and communities internationally.
document.input: International Higher Education (IHE) publishes insightful, informed, and high-quality commentary and analysis on trends and issues of importance to higher education systems, institutions, and stakeholders around the world.
